title: Civic AI
description: Civic AI is artificial intelligence that answers to the people it affects — the 6-Pack of Care, a research project by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green at the Oxford Institute for Ethics in AI.
description_zh: 仁工智慧是會向受其影響的人們負責的人工智慧——唐鳳與 Caroline Green 在牛津大學 AI 倫理研究所提出的「關懷六力」研究計畫。
